market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: £100 Leeds Apartment – City Center, 2 Beds, 4 Guests
Save 35%: 2-Bed Apartment in Leeds’ Heart (72.8% Booked)
analysis.rewritten_desc: Chic 2-bedroom apartment at a 35% discount to local averages! Located in Leeds city center (verified address: [insert precise neighborhood here]), this 4-guest property mixes modern comforts with unbeatable value. While other listings charge £154+ for city center access, we offer walkable proximity to [insert specific attractions here] at just £100/night. The 24 open nights across the next 90 days mean you can secure this highly-rated (4.88) property even with last-minute plans. Fully furnished for travelers, with [insert key detail like 'free downtown parking' or 'sofa bed in living area'] to ensure flexibility. Book now with a 17-review track record for consistent quality.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Place the living room photo first as it shows social space and modern decor – critical for first impressions in city-center listings
key_diagnosis: Priced at £100 (35% below cohort median £154.60) but only shows 72.8% occupancy vs market's 47.8% – undercharging without premium positioning
Description lacks specific selling points despite high review score (4.88) and significant booking volume (72.8% booked in 90 days)
Amenities missing categories strongly prioritized by local renters: no parking info in 72.8% occupied listing vs market's 47.8%
analysis.outreach_hook: We've identified an opportunity to increase revenue while maintaining 72.8% occupancy - by aligning pricing strategy with market benchmarks in Leeds center.
